message.content:
@startuml
participant "Controller" as C
participant "<UDP or TCP>Service" as S
participant "Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server" as V
participant "AppSettings" as A
participant "MessageEncryptionChannel" as M

C -> S : server()
S -> A : getApplicationKey()
S -> V : create(applicationKey)
S -> M : channel(route, encryptionChannel)
S -> V : Expect for routes and stream the service ...
@enduml
